files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Hosting.IRestartableHostedService
files.Summary: Marks an whose execution can be stopped and started again cleanly, so infrastructure may pause it for the duration of an operation that must not run concurrently with it — for example a test harness resetting the database between tests, where a live database-polling relay would otherwise contend with the reset. Implement this only on services whose / are idempotent across repeated cycles (a whose ExecuteAsync re-runs cleanly).

files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.HttpResponseMessageExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for to simplify testing.

files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.Polling
files.Summary: Provides polling utilities for waiting on asynchronous conditions during tests.

files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.PollingError
files.Summary: Represents a polling timeout error that aggregates all individual errors collected from each failed polling attempt.

files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.PollingResult<T>
files.Summary: Represents the result of a polling operation that returns a value of type T. Inherits from and provides strongly-typed access to the when the operation times out.

files.Title: Vulthil.Extensions.Testing.PollingResult
files.Summary: Represents the result of a polling operation. Inherits from and provides strongly-typed access to the when the operation times out.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.ConsumeDelegate<TMessage>
files.Summary: Delegate that invokes the next stage in the consume pipeline.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.Fault<TMessage>
files.Summary: Represents a fault envelope containing the original message and failure details.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IConsumeFilter<TMessage>
files.Summary: A filter in the consume pipeline. Filters wrap the consumer invocation, allowing cross-cutting concerns (logging, validation, scoped resource management, telemetry, etc.) to be composed without modifying transport or consumer code.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IConsumer<TMessage>
files.Summary: Defines a consumer that processes messages of type TMessage.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IConsumer
files.Summary: Marker interface for message consumers.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IMessageContext<TMessage>
files.Summary: Provides transport-level metadata and the deserialized payload for a received message.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IMessageContext
files.Summary: Provides transport-level metadata for a received message.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IRequestConsumer<TRequest, TResponse>
files.Summary: Defines a consumer that handles a request of type TRequest and produces a response of type TResponse.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.IRequestConsumer
files.Summary: Marker interface for request/reply consumers.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Consumers.MessageContextSnapshot
files.Summary: An immutable, serializable snapshot of an 's transport metadata captured at a point in time (e.g. when a is produced). Unlike it carries no behavior and no live transport binding, so it round-trips cleanly through serialization.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Publishers.IPublishContext
files.Summary: Provides a write-only context for configuring outgoing message properties. Every member sets a value on the message being published; nothing is read back through this interface.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Publishers.IPublisher
files.Summary: Publishes messages to a message broker.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Publishers.IRequestContext
files.Summary: Extends with request-specific configuration options, such as timeouts.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Publishers.IRequester
files.Summary: Sends a request message and awaits a response from a remote consumer.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Publishers.ISendEndpoint
files.Summary: Sends messages to a single, addressable destination (point-to-point delivery).

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Abstractions.Publishers.ISendEndpointProvider
files.Summary: Resolves instances for point-to-point message delivery.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.ConsumeFilterOptions
files.Summary: Configures the built-in consume filters that AddMessaging registers by default. Each flag toggles a specific filter on or off; setting a flag to false causes the filter to pass deliveries straight through without performing its work.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.DependencyInjection
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for registering messaging services.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.IMessageConfigurationProvider
files.Summary: Read-only view of the messaging options resolved at runtime by transports, consumers, and filters. Backed by the same instance that writes to during composition.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.IMessagingConfigurator
files.Summary: Fluent configurator for registering messaging queues, consumers, and options.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.IMessagingOptionsConfigurator
files.Summary: Mutable view of the messaging options used during composition. Passed to the action of .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.ITransport
files.Summary: Represents the message transport responsible for starting consumer connections.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.Cosmos.CosmosInboxExtensions
files.Summary: Service-collection extensions that register the Cosmos idempotency store.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.Cosmos.CosmosInboxModelBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: extensions that apply the Cosmos mapping.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.EntityFrameworkCore.ISaveInboxMessages
files.Summary: Exposes the set for persistence contexts that support inbox-based idempotency. Implement this on the application's so an idempotency store can read and write markers, regardless of the underlying provider (relational or Cosmos).

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.EntityFrameworkCore.InboxMessage
files.Summary: A persisted idempotency marker recording that a message with a given key has been processed. Shared by the relational and Cosmos idempotency stores.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.IIdempotencyStore
files.Summary: A persistence-agnostic store that records which messages have already been processed, enabling exactly-once consumer processing on a transactional store (effectively-once otherwise) on top of at-least-once delivery.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.IInboxKeySelector<TMessage>
files.Summary: Resolves the idempotency key for a delivery of TMessage. The key must be stable across redeliveries (and ideally across producer republishes) of the same logical message.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.InboxConfiguratorExtensions
files.Summary: Configurator extensions that opt a message type into idempotent (inbox) processing.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.InboxOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for the idempotent-receiver (inbox) consume filter.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.MissingIdempotencyKeyException
files.Summary: Thrown when an idempotency-guarded delivery has no resolvable idempotency key and is enabled.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.Relational.RelationalInboxExtensions
files.Summary: Service-collection extensions that register the relational Entity Framework Core idempotency store.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Inbox.Relational.RelationalInboxModelBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: extensions that apply the relational mapping.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.MessageConfiguration<TMessage>
files.Summary: Configuration options for a specific message type, including exchange, routing key and correlation ID selection.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.MessageConfiguration
files.Summary: Configuration used when publishing or binding a message type. Contains exchange declaration settings, the stable wire URN, and optional formatters for routing keys and correlation ids.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.MessagingExchangeType
files.Summary: Specifies values for MessagingExchangeType.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Outbox.TransactionalOutboxExtensions
files.Summary: Messaging-configurator extensions that enable the transactional bus-publish outbox.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.PartitionSpec
files.Summary: Records how a message type is partitioned for ordered consumption: the whose lanes serialize same-key processing, and the typed key selector (held as a because the message type is only known generically at registration). The transport resolves the concrete selector via the registered message type.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Partitioner
files.Summary: Distributes work across a fixed number of ordered partitions ("lanes"), selected by a hash of a partition key. Work submitted for the same key runs strictly sequentially and in submission order; work for keys that hash to different lanes runs concurrently.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.ConsumerRegistration
files.Summary: A consumer registration for one-way message consumption.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.ConsumerType
files.Summary: Wraps a CLR type representing a consumer in the messaging infrastructure.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.DeadLetterDefinition
files.Summary: Describes the dead letter queue and exchange configuration.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.IBaseConfigurator<TConfigurator>
files.Summary: Self-typed base interface for fluent consumer configurators. TConfigurator is the derived configurator interface (e.g. ), so returns it directly — concrete configurator classes inherit without needing their own explicit interface implementations.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.IConsumerConfigurator<TConsumer>
files.Summary: Configures per-consumer settings. Binding patterns live on ; routing-key formatters for the producer side live on .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.IQueueConfigurator
files.Summary: Configures a queue's consumers, retry policies, and dead letter settings.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.IRequestConfigurator<TConsumer>
files.Summary: Configures per-request-consumer settings. Binding patterns live on ; routing-key formatters for the producer side live on .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.MessageType
files.Summary: Wraps a CLR type representing a message exchanged through the messaging infrastructure.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.QueueDefinition
files.Summary: Describes a queue including its consumer registrations, exchange bindings, and runtime settings.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.Registration
files.Summary: Base record for a consumer registration on a queue, binding a consumer to the message type it handles. Routing-key patterns belong on (queue→exchange binding) or (producer-side routing key).

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.RequestConsumerRegistration
files.Summary: A consumer registration for request/reply message consumption.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.RetryPolicyConfigurator
files.Summary: Fluent builder for constructing a .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.RetryPolicyDefinition
files.Summary: Defines a retry policy including intervals, jitter, and exception filtering.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Queues.Subscription
files.Summary: Binds the queue to a concrete message type's exchange. One = one exchange→queue binding declared at topology setup time.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.RabbitMq.MessagingConfiguratorExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for configuring the RabbitMQ transport on an .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.RabbitMq.RabbitMqTransportOptions
files.Summary: RabbitMQ transport tuning options. Bound from the Messaging:RabbitMq configuration section and optionally overridden in code via the configureTransport callback on (code takes precedence over configuration).

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.RabbitMq.Telemetry.MessagingInstrumentation
files.Summary: Provides the emitted by the Vulthil RabbitMQ transport.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.RabbitMq.Telemetry.TracerProviderBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: OpenTelemetry registration helpers for the Vulthil RabbitMQ transport.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.TestHarness.CapturedMessage<TMessage>
files.Summary: A single message captured by the : the deserialized payload and the wire it travelled in (correlation/conversation ids, headers, addresses, …).

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.TestHarness.ITestHarness
files.Summary: In-memory messaging test harness. Captures every message produced and consumed through the in-memory transport so tests can assert on messaging behaviour with no broker, and lets a test stand in for an external service by handling published messages or responding to requests.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.TestHarness.TestHarnessExtensions
files.Summary: Registers the in-memory transport. The harness reuses the messaging configuration (queues, consumers, message settings) that AddMessaging registered, so it mirrors the real topology with no broker.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.ConsumePipelineFactory
files.Summary: Composes the registered instances into a single delegate. Transport authors call this in their consume path to wrap a terminal stage (the consumer invocation) with the configured middleware.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.HandlerEntry<THandler>
files.Summary: Pairs a transport-specific dispatch handler with the consumer contract it implements. Returned by so can enforce request-consumer uniqueness without inspecting the opaque THandler value.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.HandlerKind
files.Summary: Classifies a dispatch handler by its consumer contract.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.IMessageHandlerFactory<THandler>
files.Summary: Builds transport-specific dispatch handlers from the open-generic consumer/message type pairs collected during registration. A transport implements this to bind a registration to its own delivery closure; calls it while assembling execution plans.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.IPublishFilter
files.Summary: A filter in the publish/send pipeline. Filters wrap the transport send, allowing cross-cutting concerns (transactional outbox capture, logging, validation, telemetry, …) to be composed without modifying transport or caller code.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.ITransportPublisher
files.Summary: A transport's raw publish terminal: it builds the wire envelope and sends it to the broker. The public registered to callers is a filtering facade that runs the publish pipeline and then delegates to this terminal. Transports register their publisher under this interface instead of .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.ITransportSendEndpointProvider
files.Summary: A transport's raw send-endpoint provider. The public registered to callers is a filtering facade that wraps the returned with the publish pipeline. Transports register their provider under this interface instead of .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.MessageContext<TMessage>
files.Summary: A strongly-typed carrying the deserialized message payload.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.MessageContext
files.Summary: Transport-agnostic implementation describing a delivered message and the transport services that back its and helpers. A transport builds one per delivery (typically via ); a context with no live transport binding (e.g. a fault snapshot) throws when a publish or send is attempted.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.MessageEnvelope
files.Summary: On-the-wire wrapper for messages carried by a Vulthil transport. The body of every produced message is a serialized ; receivers fall back to bare JSON only for compatibility with non-Vulthil producers.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.MessageEnvelopeFactory
files.Summary: Builds instances from the resolved publish state for a single outgoing message. Promotes the reserved metadata headers carried by a to typed envelope fields and copies the remaining custom headers verbatim.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.MessageExecutionPlan<THandler>
files.Summary: Transport-agnostic execution plan for a single concrete message type: the ordered set of handlers that run on every delivery, plus the partition specification when the type is partitioned for ordered consumption. Built and keyed by .

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.MessageExecutionRegistry<THandler>
files.Summary: Transport-agnostic registry that turns registrations into per-message-type instances. It keys plans by wire URN (and CLR full name for the bare-JSON receive path), fans a polymorphic registration out across every matching concrete subscription, dedupes handlers, rejects a second request consumer for the same message type, and attaches the partition specification read from . A transport drives it by supplying an that builds its own delivery closures.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.PublishContext
files.Summary: Mutable, write-through configuration captured for a single outgoing message. A transport creates one, passes it to the caller's configure callback as , then reads the resolved values to build its wire message. Metadata that maps to typed envelope fields is stored under reserved header keys and surfaced through the strongly-typed properties.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.PublishFilterContext
files.Summary: The context flowing through the publish/send filter pipeline for a single outgoing message. A filter may inspect the message and its resolved metadata, adjust , short-circuit the pipeline by not invoking next (e.g. to capture the message into a transactional outbox), or let it proceed to the transport terminal.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.PublishFilterDelegate
files.Summary: Delegate that invokes the next stage in the publish/send pipeline. The terminal stage performs the actual transport publish or send.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.PublishFilteringServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Registers the publish/send filtering facade in front of a transport's raw publish terminal. A transport registers its publisher and send-endpoint provider under / and then calls so the public / run every publish and send through the pipeline.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.PublishKind
files.Summary: Identifies whether an outgoing message is being broadcast over an exchange (publish) or delivered to a single addressable destination (send).

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.PublishPipelineFactory
files.Summary: Composes the registered instances around a terminal delegate (the transport send). The filtering publisher/send-endpoint call this in their publish path to wrap the transport with the configured middleware.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.RequestContext
files.Summary: A for request/reply: adds the per-request timeout. A transport creates one, passes it to the caller's configure callback as , then reads to bound the wait for a response.

files.Title: Vulthil.Messaging.Transport.RpcFault
files.Summary: Wire payload for an RPC failure reply. Carried as the message of a whose messageType is . Property names are fixed (camelCase) so the reply round-trips regardless of the configured JSON naming policy.

files.Title: Vulthil.Results.Error
files.Summary: Represents a structured error with a code, description, and classification.

files.Title: Vulthil.Results.ErrorType
files.Summary: Specifies values for ErrorType.

files.Title: Vulthil.Results.Result<TValue>
files.Summary: Represents the outcome of an operation that returns a value of type TValue on success.

files.Title: Vulthil.Results.Result
files.Summary: Represents the outcome of an operation that may succeed or fail.

files.Title: Vulthil.Results.ResultExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for and .

files.Title: Vulthil.Results.ValidationError
files.Summary: Represents a validation error containing one or more inner errors.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Api.BaseController
files.Summary: Abstract base API controller with preconfigured route conventions and a lazily-resolved logger.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Api.CustomResults
files.Summary: Provides factory methods for creating problem-detail HTTP responses from values.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Api.DependencyInjection
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for registering API-layer services.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Api.EndpointExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for discovering and mapping implementations.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Api.Extensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for converting values to HTTP responses.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Api.IEndpoint
files.Summary: Defines a minimal API endpoint that registers its routes during application startup.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Api.ProblemDetailsExtensions
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for wiring RFC 7807 ProblemDetails responses across the request pipeline, covering handled failures, uncaught exceptions, and bare error status codes.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.ApplicationOptions
files.Summary: Aggregated configuration options for the application layer, combining handler and validation settings.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Behaviors.TransactionalPipelineBehavior<TCommand, TResponse>
files.Summary: Pipeline behavior that wraps transactional commands in a database transaction, committing when the command succeeds and rolling back when it returns a failed or throws.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Data.IDbTransaction
files.Summary: Represents an active database transaction that can be committed or rolled back.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Data.IUnitOfWork
files.Summary: Abstracts the persistence boundary for saving changes and managing transactions.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.DependencyInjection
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for registering application-layer services.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.FluentValidationExtensions
files.Summary: Provides FluentValidation integration helpers for .

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.FluentValidationOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for FluentValidation assembly scanning.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.HandlerOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for handler assembly scanning and pipeline registration.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.DomainEvents.IDomainEventPublisher
files.Summary: Publishes domain events to their registered handlers.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.ICommand<TResponse>
files.Summary: Marker interface for a command that returns a response of type TResponse.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.ICommand
files.Summary: Marker interface for a command that returns a .

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.ICommandHandler<TCommand>
files.Summary: Defines a handler for a command that returns a .

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.ICommandHandler<TCommand, TResponse>
files.Summary: Defines a handler for a command that returns a response of type TResponse.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.IHandler<TRequest, TResponse>
files.Summary: Defines a handler that processes a request and returns a response.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.IQuery<TResponse>
files.Summary: Marker interface for a query that returns a response of type TResponse.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.IQueryHandler<TQuery, TResponse>
files.Summary: Defines a handler for a query that returns a response of type TResponse.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.IRequest<TResponse>
files.Summary: Marker interface for a request that produces a response of type TResponse.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.IRequest
files.Summary: Marker interface for a request that produces a .

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.ISender
files.Summary: Dispatches requests to their registered handlers through the pipeline.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.ITransactionalCommand<TResponse>
files.Summary: Marker interface for a transactional command that returns a response of type TResponse.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Messaging.ITransactionalCommand
files.Summary: Marker interface for a command that returns a and should be executed within a transaction.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Pipeline.DomainEventPipelineDelegate
files.Summary: Represents the next step in the domain event pipeline.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Pipeline.IDomainEventPipelineHandler<TDomainEvent>
files.Summary: Defines a pipeline handler that wraps domain event processing with cross-cutting behavior.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Pipeline.IPipelineHandler<TRequest, TResponse>
files.Summary: Defines a pipeline handler that wraps request processing with cross-cutting behavior.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Application.Pipeline.PipelineDelegate<TResponse>
files.Summary: Represents the next step in the request pipeline.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Events.IDomainEvent
files.Summary: Marker interface for domain events raised by aggregate roots.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Events.IDomainEventHandler<TDomainEvent>
files.Summary: Defines a handler that processes a specific domain event type.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Exceptions.DomainException
files.Summary: Base exception for domain rule violations, carrying a structured .

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cosmos.CosmosOutboxModelBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: extensions that apply the Cosmos DB mapping.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cosmos.DependencyInjectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extensions to configure provider-specific behavior for database infrastructure when using Cosmos DB.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Cosmos.OutboxProcessing.CosmosOutboxStore<TContext>
files.Summary: Cosmos outbox store. Cosmos DB has no cross-partition transaction, so the relay runs without an ambient transaction (best-effort): it uses the base LINQ fetch and materialized update. Consumers targeting Cosmos at scale should supply an SDK-backed store.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Data.BaseDbContext
files.Summary: Abstract base that implements and for outbox integration.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Data.DbContextExtensions
files.Summary: Extension methods for to support domain event dispatching on save.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Data.DbContextTransactionWrapper
files.Summary: Wraps an EF Core as an .

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.DatabaseInfrastructureConfigurator<TDbContext>
files.Summary: Fluent configurator for database infrastructure including outbox processing. The DbContext itself is registered by provider-specific extensions (e.g. UseNpgsql) via the hook, not by this class.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.DependencyInjection
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for registering infrastructure-layer services.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.IDatabaseInfrastructureConfigurator<TDbContext>
files.Summary: Defines methods for configuring database infrastructure options for Entity Framework Core DbContext instances.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.MySql.DependencyInjectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extensions to configure provider-specific behavior for database infrastructure when using MySQL.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.MySql.MySqlOutboxModelBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: extensions that apply the MySQL-optimized mapping.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.MySql.OutboxProcessing.MySqlOutboxStore<TContext>
files.Summary: MySQL-optimized outbox store that fetches messages with SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED so multiple processors can drain distinct rows concurrently.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Npgsql.DependencyInjectionExtensions
files.Summary: Extensions to configure provider-specific behavior for database infrastructure when using PostgreSQL.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Npgsql.NpgsqlOutboxModelBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: extensions that apply the PostgreSQL-optimized mapping.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Npgsql.OutboxProcessing.NpgsqlOutboxStore<TContext>
files.Summary: PostgreSQL-optimized outbox store that fetches messages with SELECT ... FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED so multiple processors can drain distinct rows concurrently.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Relational.DependencyInjection
files.Summary: Provides extension methods for applying pending Entity Framework Core migrations to a specified DbContext using dependency injection.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Relational.OutboxProcessing.RelationalOutboxStore<TContext>
files.Summary: Outbox store for relational database providers. Records processed and failed messages with set-based ExecuteUpdate calls instead of materializing rows. Provider packages (e.g. Npgsql, MySQL) inherit from this class and override to add row-level locking.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Relational.RelationalOutboxServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Service-collection extensions for relational outbox providers.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure.Repository.GenericRepository<TDbContext, TEntity, TId>
files.Summary: Base repository providing common data access operations for aggregate roots.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.EntityFrameworkCore.DomainEventsToOutboxMessageSaveChangesInterceptor
files.Summary: EF Core save-changes interceptor that captures domain events from tracked aggregate roots and persists them as entries before the main save completes.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.EntityFrameworkCore.EntityFrameworkOutboxStore<TContext>
files.Summary: Entity Framework Core implementation of . It owns the relay batch unit — runs inside the context's execution strategy, opens the transaction, fetches a batch, dispatches each message, records the outcome, and commits — and exposes the capture surface used by bus-publish filters. Provider packages derive from this type to add row-level locking (), set-based updates (), or a no-op transaction ().

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.EntityFrameworkCore.IOutboxInterceptor
files.Summary: Marker for EF Core interceptors that the outbox attaches to an outbox-enabled . Implementations are resolved from DI and added to the context options when outbox processing is enabled, so a provider package (e.g. relational) can contribute a transaction-commit interceptor without the provider-agnostic base needing to reference relational-only interceptor types.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.EntityFrameworkCore.ISaveOutboxMessages
files.Summary: Exposes the entity set for persistence contexts that support outbox integration.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.EntityFrameworkCore.OutboxModelBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: extensions that apply the provider-agnostic mapping.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.IOutboxDispatcher
files.Summary: Relays a fetched outbox message to its sink. The routes each row to the registered dispatcher whose returns true for the row's , so a single outbox table can feed several sinks (in-process domain events, broker publishes/sends) that coexist in one application.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.IOutboxRelayGate
files.Summary: A readiness gate the outbox relay awaits once before its first processing pass. It lets a downstream sink defer the relay until its delivery channel is ready — for example, the message-broker sink waits for the transport to declare its subscriber topology, so a relayed publish is not lost by being sent before the subscriber queues are bound. When no gate is registered the relay starts immediately.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.IOutboxSignal
files.Summary: Wakes the outbox background service when a transaction commits, so freshly-written outbox messages are relayed promptly instead of waiting for the next poll. Signals coalesce (at most one pending wake), and the periodic poll remains the correctness backstop for retries, other instances, and missed signals.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.IOutboxStore
files.Summary: Persistence-agnostic store the outbox engine relies on for both capture and relay. A relational or other EF Core implementation lives in Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.EntityFrameworkCore and its provider packages; the engine itself takes no dependency on EF Core.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.OutboxDestination
files.Summary: Identifies the sink an outbox message is relayed to, so the can route each row to the matching . One outbox table can carry messages bound for different sinks.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.OutboxEngineServiceCollectionExtensions
files.Summary: Service-collection extensions that register the provider-agnostic outbox engine — the relay processor, the background service, the commit-time signal, and the in-process domain-event sink. A persistence host (e.g. Vulthil.SharedKernel.Infrastructure) calls this and then registers an implementation for its provider.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.OutboxMessage
files.Summary: Represents a serialized domain event stored for reliable outbox-based delivery.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.OutboxMessageData
files.Summary: Contains the data of an outbox message fetched for delivery.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.OutboxMessageFailure
files.Summary: Contains failure details for an outbox message that could not be published.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.OutboxProcessingOptions
files.Summary: Configuration options for the outbox background processing service.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.Telemetry
files.Summary: Static class for holding the Telemetry ActivitySource used for all outbox processing operations, enabling consistent correlation of telemetry across the capture, processing, and publishing stages.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Outbox.TracerProviderBuilderExtensions
files.Summary: OpenTelemetry registration helpers for the Vulthil outbox processing telemetry.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Primitives.AggregateRoot<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for aggregate roots that track and raise domain events.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Primitives.Entity<TId>
files.Summary: Base class for domain entities identified by a strongly-typed identifier. Entities are compared by identity: two entities are equal when they have the same runtime type and equal, non-default values. A transient entity — one whose is still the default value — is only equal to itself.

files.Title: Vulthil.SharedKernel.Primitives.IAggregateRoot
files.Summary: Defines the contract for an aggregate root that tracks domain events.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.BaseIntegrationTestCase<TFactory, TEntryPoint>
files.Summary: Base class for integration tests that use a with container-based infrastructure.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.BaseUnitTestCase<TTarget>
files.Summary: Base class for unit tests that automatically creates and exposes a lazily-initialized target instance of TTarget.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.BaseUnitTestCase
files.Summary: Base class for unit tests providing auto-mocking, lifecycle hooks, and a shared cancellation token.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.BaseWebApplicationFactory<TEntryPoint>
files.Summary: Abstract that manages a set of test containers, injects their connection strings into the test host, and ensures EF Core migrations are applied during host startup.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Cosmos.CosmosTestContainerFixture<TDbContext>
files.Summary: Fixture that starts the Azure Cosmos DB Linux emulator in a container and registers TDbContext in the test host pointed at it. Connectivity goes through the container's own , whose handler rewrites every request to the mapped emulator endpoint, so no certificate or endpoint plumbing is needed. When owned by a , every consuming factory works in its own emulator database, so parallel test classes never share data; data is reset between tests by recreating that database. Derived classes only supply the configuration key (and optionally pin the emulator image via Configure).

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.ContainerHost
files.Summary: Assembly-level fixture that owns a set of shared test containers, so heavyweight infrastructure (database servers, message brokers, emulators) starts at most once per test run instead of once per test class.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.ITestContainer
files.Summary: Represents a test container that can be started and stopped as part of the test lifecycle, and that may participate in configuring the test host.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.ITestContainerScopeProvider
files.Summary: Implemented by test containers that can mint per-scope views of themselves, so a single running container (typically owned by a assembly fixture) can serve many test classes in parallel without sharing state. A scope usually maps to an isolated namespace inside the shared container — a uniquely named database on a database server, a virtual host on a message broker, or a key prefix in a cache.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.ITestContainerWithConnectionString
files.Summary: Extends with a connection string for use in integration tests.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.ITestDatabaseContainer
files.Summary: Extends with database migration capabilities. Data is reset between tests through (Respawn).

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.RabbitMqTestContainerFixture<TBuilderEntity, TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Fixture that wraps a RabbitMQ broker container. When owned by a , every consuming factory gets its own virtual host on the shared broker (created via rabbitmqctl inside the container and appended to the AMQP connection string), so parallel test classes never see each other's exchanges, queues or messages. Derived classes only configure the container and supply the connection string and key.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.TestContainerFixture<TBuilderEntity, TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Base fixture that wraps a Testcontainers container as an for use in .

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.TestContainerFixtureWithConnectionString<TBuilderEntity, TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Fixture that wraps a Testcontainers container and exposes a connection string for integration test configuration.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Fixtures.TestDatabaseContainerFixture<TDbContext, TBuilderEntity, TContainerEntity>
files.Summary: Fixture that wraps a database container, applies EF Core migrations, and supports Respawn-based data resets between tests. When owned by a , gives every consuming factory its own uniquely named database on the shared server, so parallel test classes never see each other's data.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Http.CapturedHttpRequest
files.Summary: A snapshot of a request received by an , captured for assertions.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Http.HttpMock
files.Summary: Default in-process implementation. Holds the configured response rules and captured requests as durable state, and hands out lightweight instances (which the HTTP client factory owns and may dispose) that delegate back to this shared state.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Http.IHttpMock
files.Summary: An in-process fake for an outbound dependency. Configure stubbed responses per test and inspect the requests the system under test sent. Register one per typed client via AddHttpMock<TClient, TImplementation>() on the factory and retrieve it with HttpMock<TClient>().

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.Http.IHttpMockResponseBuilder
files.Summary: Configures the response a matched request should receive. Returned by the On methods on . Header methods apply to the response defined by the preceding RespondWith call and can be chained.

files.Title: Vulthil.xUnit.IResettableResource
files.Summary: A test resource whose state can be reset to a clean baseline between tests — for example a database reset via Respawn, or an HTTP mock whose configured responses and captured requests are cleared.
